title: VetoRuleset
description: Schema for evolve veto rulesets. Validated by veto.py at load time. Editor-time validation: add `"$schema": "./veto_rules.schema.json"` to your custom ruleset JSON for IDE support.

name.description: Human-readable ruleset name; defaults to 'custom' when omitted.
Stable identifier for the rule; surfaced in CLI verdict tables.

metric.description: Which delta metric this rule evaluates.

op.description: Failure operator: `lt -0.05` fails when value < -0.05; `abs_gt` triggers on |value| exceeding threshold.

threshold.description: The numeric boundary the operator compares against.

severity.description: `hard` blocks adoption (exit code 1). `soft` requires human review (exit code 2).

message.description: Human-readable failure message. Supports `{value}` and `{threshold}` template tokens.
